name: eldegoss
flavor_texts: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.
The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.
text: Eldegoss is the Cotton Bloom Pokémon. It is a grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: cotton-down, regenerator, effect-spore (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 50, Defense: 90, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 120, Speed: 60. Evolution line: gossifleur → eldegoss. Lore: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them. The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.
